codeReview.summary: The sidebar navigation has been correctly updated to enforce strict role separation. Admin sidebar contains only system management items (Dashboard, Users Management, Audit Logs, School Year Setup, Settings, User Settings) with all book/circulation items removed. Librarian sidebar contains all library operations (Dashboard, Circulation, Books Catalog, Book Management, QR Management, Excel Migration, Student Lookup, Daily Operations, Reports, Settings) with user management correctly excluded.

VAL-SIDEBAR-001.notes: Admin navItems array does not contain 'Books Management' or '/admin/books' link

VAL-SIDEBAR-002.notes: Admin navItems array does not contain 'QR/Copy Management' or '/admin/qr-management' link

VAL-SIDEBAR-003.notes: Admin navItems array does not contain 'Excel Migration' or '/admin/excel-migration' link

VAL-SIDEBAR-004.notes: Admin navItems array does not contain 'Circulation' link

VAL-SIDEBAR-005.notes: Admin navItems contains all required items: Users Management (/admin/users), Audit Logs (/admin/audit-logs), School Year Setup (/admin/school-year-setup), Settings (/admin/settings), User Settings (/admin/user-settings). Also includes Dashboard which is acceptable.

VAL-SIDEBAR-006.notes: Librarian navItems contains 'Book Management' link at /librarian/books-management

VAL-SIDEBAR-007.notes: Librarian navItems contains 'QR Management' link at /librarian/qr-management

VAL-SIDEBAR-008.notes: Librarian navItems contains 'Excel Migration' link at /librarian/excel-migration

VAL-SIDEBAR-010.notes: Librarian navItems does not contain 'Users Management' link

VAL-SIDEBAR-011.notes: NavLink components from react-router-dom are used correctly. The navItems array is dynamically selected based on user.role, using ternary operators to select between studentNavItems, librarianNavItems, and adminNavItems. This is the standard navigation pattern in this codebase.

summary: Feature implementation is complete and correct. All 11 assertions pass. The sidebar navigation properly separates Admin and Librarian roles, with Admin having only system management access and Librarian having full library operations access. TypeScript compilation and linting passed with no errors related to the changes.
